selected_goal.title: 1. In main.py, replace imported names with correct assistant functions: add_note, list_notes, delete_note, set_reminder, list_reminders, load_json, save_json.
selected_goal.rationale: Project passed validation but has import mismatch between main.py and assistant.py, leading to stub fallback and non-functional assistant features. Smoke test timed out (interactive app assumed). Need to correct integration and add missing todo functionality.
acceptance_criteria: Fix import: main.py calls correct assistant functions (add_note, list_notes, delete_note, set_reminder, list_reminders).
Todo commands exist and persist to todos.json.
All commands (notes, reminders, todos) are listed in a help menu.

designed_tasks.description: In main.py, replace the imported stub functions (load_notes, save_notes, load_reminders, save_reminders, check_reminders, start_reminder_checker, NOTE_FILE, REMINDER_FILE) with the correct assistant functions (add_note, list_notes, delete_note, set_reminder, list_reminders, load_json, save_json). Update the command dispatch loop in main.py to call these correct functions. Remove the fallback stub definitions entirely so that assistant.py is the sole source of implementation.
acceptance_criteria: main.py imports add_note, list_notes, delete_note, set_reminder, list_reminders, load_json, save_json from assistant.py instead of the previous stub names.
The fallback stub code (the except ImportError block with stub definitions) is removed from main.py.
The command loop dispatches 'note add', 'note list', 'note delete', 'reminder set', 'reminder list' using the imported assistant functions.
The application starts without ImportError and note/reminder commands are functional.
risk_notes: If assistant.py is missing or has different signatures, the app will crash on startup; ensure assistant.py is present and correct.
The interactive nature means smoke test may still time out; non-interactive testing not addressed here.
